# `revyl_tap`

Tap a UI element on the device screen. Describe the element in natural language (e.g. 'Sign In button', 'search icon', 'first product card'). Set longPress to true for a long-press gesture.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.revyl.tools.RevylNativeTapTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `target` — `String`
  Element to tap, described in natural language.

### Optional parameters

- `longPress` — `Boolean`
  If true, perform a long-press instead of a tap.
- `reasoning` — `String`

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)

Typed result schemas (`kind: query | action`, MCP `structuredContent`) are not yet carried by the resolved manifest — this section will gain detail when that lands.
